meta.title: Glyph Chant · The Sound of Adzmyst
meta.description: Each glyph carries a frequency. The chant is the breath made audible.

chants.name: Aleph
chants.chant_text: Ahhhhh... the ox lows in the field of beginning.
chants.meditation: The first breath. The pull of the plow. Strength without direction yet.

chants.name: Bet
chants.chant_text: Buh... the house encloses what the breath has spoken.
chants.meditation: Shelter. The body as container. The word finds a home.

chants.name: Gimel
chants.chant_text: Guh... the camel carries the load across the desert.
chants.meditation: Journey. Endurance. What moves when staying is not an option.

chants.name: Dalet
chants.chant_text: Duh... the door opens. The threshold is now.
chants.meditation: Choice. Passage. The moment between what was and what will be.

chants.name: He
chants.chant_text: Ehhhh... the window reveals what was hidden.
chants.meditation: Revelation. Light entering. The room is no longer dark.

chants.name: Waw
chants.chant_text: Wuh... the hook connects what would otherwise drift apart.
chants.meditation: Binding. Attachment. The link that holds the chain.

chants.name: Zayin
chants.chant_text: Zzzzz... the weapon cuts. The division is clean.
chants.meditation: Judgment. Separation. What is necessary and what is excess.

chants.name: Heth
chants.chant_text: Hhhhh... the fence marks the sacred ground.
chants.meditation: Boundary. Protection. The edge where inside meets outside.

chants.name: Teth
chants.chant_text: Tttt... the snake coils. Wisdom sleeps in the grass.
chants.meditation: Danger as teacher. The coiled thing that strikes when ignored.

chants.name: Yod
chants.chant_text: Yuh... the hand reaches. The world is shaped.
chants.meditation: Action. Making. The breath becomes touch.

chants.name: Kaph
chants.chant_text: Kuh... the palm bends. Surrender is not weakness.
chants.meditation: Opening. Yielding. What receives must first open.

chants.name: Lamed
chants.chant_text: Llll... the goad guides the ox. Authority is direction.
chants.meditation: Control. Leadership. The hand that guides without forcing.

chants.name: Mem
chants.chant_text: Mmmmm... the water flows. The deep remembers.
chants.meditation: Chaos. The unconscious. What moves beneath the surface.

chants.name: Nun
chants.chant_text: Nnnn... the snake sheds. Eternity is a circle.
chants.meditation: Renewal. Death as transformation. What falls away makes room.

chants.name: Samek
chants.chant_text: Ssss... the pillar holds. The structure is unseen.
chants.meditation: Support. Stability. What carries weight without asking.

chants.name: Ayin
chants.chant_text: Ohhhhh... the eye sees without being seen.
chants.meditation: Perception. Witness. The watcher who does not interfere.

chants.name: Pe
chants.chant_text: Puh... the mouth speaks. The breath becomes word.
chants.meditation: Prophecy. Speech. The sound that creates.

chants.name: Tsade
chants.chant_text: Tssss... the hook catches. The harvest is gathered.
chants.meditation: Gathering. What was cast out returns.

chants.name: Qoph
chants.chant_text: Qhhhh... the sun on the horizon. The cycle turns.
chants.meditation: Return. The eternal. What sets always rises.

chants.name: Resh
chants.chant_text: Rrrr... the head thinks. Therefore what is.
chants.meditation: Mind. Beginning again. The crown that leads.

chants.name: Shin
chants.chant_text: Shhhh... the tooth consumes. Fire transforms.
chants.meditation: Destruction as creation. What burns makes way.

chants.name: Taw
chants.chant_text: Tuh... the mark is made. This is finished. This is true.
chants.meditation: Completion. Signature. The seal that holds.
